dispatch_flow.name: dispatch_weather_agent
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_REQUEST frame with 4-byte length prefix

dispatch_flow.name: weather_callback
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_RESULT frame with 4-byte length prefix

dispatch_flow.name: dispatch_attraction_agent_after_weather
dispatch_flow.required_flow: Coordinator 等待 Weather 结果后，再唤醒 Attraction Agent
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_REQUEST frame with weather_result in context.inputs

dispatch_flow.name: attraction_callback
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_RESULT frame with 4-byte length prefix

dispatch_flow.name: dispatch_hotel_agent_after_attraction
dispatch_flow.required_flow: Coordinator 等待 Attraction 结果后，再唤醒 Hotel Agent
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_REQUEST frame with daily_plan_skeleton in context.inputs

dispatch_flow.name: hotel_callback
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_RESULT frame with 4-byte length prefix

dispatch_flow.name: dispatch_traffic_agent_after_hotel
dispatch_flow.required_flow: Coordinator 等待 Hotel 结果后，再唤醒 Traffic Agent
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_REQUEST frame with daily_plan_skeleton and hotel_plan in context.inputs

dispatch_flow.name: traffic_callback
dispatch_flow.network: TCP A2A TASK_RESULT frame with 4-byte length prefix

dispatch_flow.name: aggregate_final_plan
dispatch_flow.required_flow: Coordinator 汇总天气、景点、住宿、交通结果，生成最终旅行方案
dispatch_flow.network: HTTP response to /submit_task

plan.routing_policy: fixed DAG in latest version: Weather -> Attraction -> Hotel -> Traffic

payload.final_answer:
最终旅行方案：用户问题为「帮我规划明天去广州的旅行方案，分别考虑天气情况和交通路线，并给出合理的出行建议。」。
本次任务按照 Weather Agent -> Attraction Agent -> Hotel Agent -> Traffic Agent 的网络依赖顺序执行。
- weather_agent: 执行失败，错误为 MCP JSON-RPC error: {'code': -32003, 'message': 'Upstream MCP request failed: request failed: [WinError 10061] 由于目标计算机积极拒绝，无法连接。'}
- attraction_agent: 已根据普通预算、用户偏好和天气约束，为广州3天行程生成结构化景点计划；整体按天气约束安排。
- hotel_agent: 已先根据景点分布选择住宿区域：珠江新城-广州塔区域，再从该区域酒店中选择：王府井青年旅舍。
- traffic_agent: 已根据每日景点和用户约束生成交通方案：地铁/公交/步行为主，低预算优先，市内交通费用约30元。
景点行程骨架：
- day1: 广州塔（珠江新城-广州塔区域）
- day2: 广州塔（珠江新城-广州塔区域）
- day3: 广州塔（珠江新城-广州塔区域）
